rules: Do not add large raw videos to the theme zip.
Use retired-commerce-platform Files/CDN for heavy media.
Keep app/backend logic outside theme zip.
Preserve accessibility and localization features without bloating assets.
Use external app/backend routes for dynamic features.
featureStrategy: Images and heavy assets are uploaded separately.
Products/collections carry images through retired-commerce-platform CDN.
App logic stays in Vercel/serverless app.
